name: Service Agreement
description: A contract between a service provider and a client defining the scope, terms, and payment for services rendered.

sections.title: Parties
sections.content: This Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} between {{provider_name}}, located at {{provider_address}} ("Service Provider"), and {{client_name}}, located at {{client_address}} ("Client").

sections.title: Services
sections.content: Service Provider agrees to provide the following services to Client ("Services"): {{services_description}}. Service Provider shall commence the Services on {{start_date}}{{#end_date}} and shall complete the Services by {{end_date}}{{/end_date}}.

sections.title: Compensation
sections.content: In consideration for the Services, Client agrees to pay Service Provider {{payment_amount}} on a {{payment_schedule}} basis. All invoices are due within {{payment_due_days}} days of receipt. Late payments shall accrue interest at the rate of 1.5% per month or the maximum rate permitted by law, whichever is less.

sections.title: Independent Contractor
sections.content: Service Provider is an independent contractor and not an employee of Client. Service Provider shall be solely responsible for all taxes, insurance, and other obligations arising from the performance of the Services. Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed to create a partnership, joint venture, or employment relationship between the parties.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All work product, deliverables, inventions, and other intellectual property created by Service Provider in connection with the Services ("Work Product") shall be considered work made for hire and shall be the sole and exclusive property of Client. To the extent any Work Product does not qualify as work made for hire, Service Provider hereby assigns to Client all rights, title, and interest in and to such Work Product.

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: Each party agrees to keep confidential and not disclose to any third party any confidential information of the other party obtained in connection with this Agreement. This obligation shall survive termination of this Agreement for a period of three (3) years.

sections.title: Representations and Warranties
sections.content: Service Provider represents and warrants that: (a) Service Provider has the right to enter into this Agreement and perform the Services; (b) the Services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner; and (c) the Work Product will not infringe any third-party intellectual property rights.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES. EACH PARTY'S TOTAL CUMULATIVE LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT SHALL NOT EXCEED THE TOTAL FEES PAID OR PAYABLE TO SERVICE PROVIDER IN THE THREE (3) MONTHS PRECEDING THE EVENT GIVING RISE TO LIABILITY.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days written notice to the other party. Client may terminate this Agreement immediately for cause if Service Provider materially breaches this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) days of receiving written notice. Upon termination, Client shall pay Service Provider for all Services performed up to the date of termination.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of {{governing_law_state}}, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration in {{governing_law_state}}.

sections.title: Entire Agreement
sections.content: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, and representations. This Agreement may be amended only by a written instrument signed by both parties.
